title: EQ - Select a value, kill the app, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ preset (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) persists after killing and reopening the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe it away from the recent apps list or use Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Force Stop).
5. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
7. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
8. Repeat steps 1–7 for each of the remaining EQ values: Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
expected: The selected EQ value persists across app restarts. For each EQ value tested (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ), the same value should still be selected after reopening the app.
